about.title: About Us
about.storyP1: NavodayaSarthi was born from a simple belief — every child in rural India deserves a chance at world-class education. The Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya system provides exactly that, but the path to getting in has always been tough for students without access to quality coaching.
about.storyP2: We built this app to bridge that gap. Our team of expert educators work tirelessly to create content that is simple, effective, and accessible — even on slow 2G connections.
about.missionText: To make high-quality JNVST preparation available to every student in India, regardless of their economic background or geographic location.

mockTest.title: Mock Tests
mockTest.retestBanner: 🔄 You have already attempted this test. This will be a new attempt.
mockTest.emptyAvailableSubtitle: You have completed all available tests. Check the Completed tab.
mockTest.emptyCompletedSubtitle: Start a test from the Available tab to see your results here.
mockTest.rule1: The timer starts as soon as you tap "Start Test".
mockTest.rule2: The test will auto-submit when time runs out.
mockTest.rule3: You can navigate between questions using the number grid.
mockTest.rule4: Answered questions are highlighted in green.
mockTest.rule5: You can change your answer anytime before submitting.
mockTest.rule6: Each correct answer carries 1 mark. No negative marking.
mockTest.rule7: Do not exit the app during the test.

faq.title: FAQ & Contact
faq.q1: When is the JNVST exam held?
faq.a1: JNVST for Class 6 is typically held in November every year. For Class 9, it is held in February. Admit cards are released 2-3 weeks before the exam.
faq.q2: Is this app free to use?
faq.a2: Yes! NavodayaSarthi is completely free for all students. Every feature — practice questions, mock tests, video lessons, live classes, and more — is fully unlocked at no cost.
faq.a3: We use OTP-based login — no password needed! Just enter your registered mobile number and verify the OTP you receive via SMS.
faq.q4: Which classes is this app for?
faq.a4: This app is designed for Class 5 students appearing for JNVST (for Class 6 admission) and Class 8 students appearing for JNVST (for Class 9 admission).
faq.a5: Practice questions and downloaded content are accessible offline. Video streaming requires an internet connection, though we optimize for low-bandwidth usage.
faq.a6: All three JNVST subjects are covered: Mental Ability (40 questions), Arithmetic (20 questions), and Language — Hindi/English (20 questions).
faq.q7: How is the mock test structured?
faq.a7: Our mock tests mirror the actual JNVST format: 80 questions, 2 hours, with a digital OMR sheet interface to help you practice filling circles.
faq.successText: We have received your message and will get back to you shortly.
